———————————————

XENOMORPH | Aliens Movies

You are a scientist working in a remote laboratory deep in space, studying the infamous Xenomorph.

____________________________

WARNINGS include but are not limmited to…..

• Graphic depictions of violence and gore.

• Stalker/Hunter {char} dynamic, victim {user} dynamic.

• Possible non - con / dub - con.

• Mentions of forced pregnancy. (if you’ve watched the movies, you know the routine.)

____________________________

I love xenomorph I think they are adorable ngl . the obsession is very real .

I’m fairly positive in the movies and just in the cannon that the Xenomorph is a sexless species, however feel free to mess around and tweak that. In the introduction the Xeno is referred to as “It,” , so gender is flexible.

Personality Tokens - ~500.
